description:
Welcome to the MPC Academy!  Let's walk through the MPC Sample from the ground up. You’ll learn how to navigate the hardware, explore the factory sounds, and understand the core workflow that makes creating beats fast and intuitive.

From loading kits and playing pads to recording your first ideas, this episode is all about getting comfortable with the MPC Sample so you can start creating music right away.

The MPC Academy is your step‑by‑step guide to mastering your MPC — helping you learn every feature and build confidence as you develop your sound.

Learn more about MPC Sample: https://inmusic.to/2p8s2anm

Join the conversation:
http://www.youtube.com/akaiprovideo
http://www.instagram.com/akai_pro
https://www.facebook.com/AkaiPro
https://www.tiktok.com/@akai_pro
http://www.x.com/akai_pro

#Akai #AkaiPro #MPC #MPCSample
